creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
ports r368845 or 692eb08[1] removed gamin-0.1.9-6.fc10.src.rpm while leaving the file in distinfo. It appears the committer assumed CRITICAL is a Fedora mirror but unlisted[2] and the file can be easily found in archive[3].

[1] https://github.com/xmj/linux-ports/commit/692eb08
[2] https://mirrors.fedoraproject.org/publiclist/
[3] https://archives.fedoraproject.org/pub/archive/fedora/linux/releases/10/Everything/source/SRPMS/gamin-0.1.9-6.fc10.src.rpm
